name: Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited
summary: Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited manufactures and sells refined castor oil first stage grades, castor de oiled cakes, and high protein castor de oiled cakes in India. It also manufactures and sells cotton bales and delineate cotton seeds. Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited was formerly known as Mangalam Global Enterprise Private Limited and changed its name to Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited on September, 2019. Mangalam Global Enterprise Limited was founded in 1942 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
